title: quickreplant
description: Quickly replant crops by clicking them with seeds!
body: ![Environment: Client](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-client-1976d2?style=flat-square) ![Mod loader: Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-Fabric-1976d2?style=flat-square) # Quickreplant This mod allows you to replant crops quickly, by holding seeds in your hand and clicking a fully grown crop.
